title: Zero In Carpet Beetle & Moth Killer Bomb - 150 ml One-Shot Aerosol Rapid-Action Knockdown Insecticidal Bomb for Carpet Beetles and Moths. Prevents Allergies. (Pack of 3)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
ONE-SHOT: Activation with a single touch to treat room areas and living spaces of up to 40m3; The formula reaches into cracks and crevices, killing on contact
PREVENTS ALLERGIES: Cleanses affected room and prevents reinfestations
ALL-NATURAL: HSE registered plant-based insecticide derived from chrysanthemum flowers – use biocides safely - always read the instructions before use
RESIDUE-FREE: Suitable for treating both hard and soft surfaces without leaving harmful residues
EFFECTIVE: Kills adult insects, their eggs and larvae to break insect breeding cycle
description: From the manufacturer More About The Products Kills Carpet Beetles and Moths. Treats living rooms, carpets, rugs and furnishings. good plant extracts - no harmful residues. Zero In good Insect Killer Carpet Beetle and Moth Bomb will treat a wide range of flying and crawling insects in buildings and living spaces. SHAKE WELL BEFORE USE.
